🌍
Welcome from the Organising Committee

Dear Colleagues and Researchers,

We are delighted to announce the International Conference on Sustainable Engineering, Environmental Innovation & Climate Resilience (ICSEECR 2026), hosted by Gateway ICT Polytechnic, Saapade, Ogun State, Nigeria.

ICSEECR 2026 provides a premier platform for interdisciplinary collaboration, knowledge exchange, and promoting innovative research in sustainable engineering, environmental innovation, and climate resilience. The conference brings together researchers, engineers, policy makers, and industry professionals from across the globe to address the most pressing challenges of our time.

We warmly invite all researchers and professionals to participate and share their expertise across our two thematic schools — Engineering & Technology and Environmental Studies — covering smart grids, renewable energy, AI-driven environmental monitoring, climate adaptation, waste management, and much more.

All accepted and presented papers will be considered for publication in the IEEE Xplore Digital Library (subject to IEEE approval), following a rigorous double-blind peer-review process.

We look forward to your participation in ICSEECR 2026 — a global forum for innovation, sustainability, and environmental resilience.

Best regards,
ICSEECR 2026 Organizing Committee
Gateway ICT Polytechnic, Saapade, Ogun State, Nigeria

🏫
School-Based Themes & Focus Areas

🔧
School of Engineering & Technology
Smart Engineering Systems and Renewable Energy Technologies for a Sustainable Future
  • Smart Grids & Power Systems
  • Solar PV Systems & Diagnostics
  • AI in Engineering Systems
  • Automation & Control
  • IoT & Embedded Systems
  • Predictive Maintenance & Digital Twin
  • Structural Health Monitoring
🌱
School of Environmental Studies
Environmental Sustainability, Climate Resilience, and Resource Management for Global Transformation
  • Climate Change Adaptation & Mitigation
  • Environmental Impact Assessment
  • Waste Management & Circular Economy
  • Water Resources & Pollution Control
  • Sustainable Urban Planning
  • Environmental Monitoring (AI & IoT)
  • Ecosystem Restoration

🔬
Technical Tracks

T-01
Renewable Energy Systems & Smart Grids
T-02
AI and IoT in Environmental Monitoring
T-03
Sustainable Infrastructure & Green Building
T-04
Climate Change Adaptation & Mitigation
T-05
Waste-to-Energy and Circular Economy
T-06
Environmental Policy & Sustainable Development
T-07
Smart Cities & IoT Applications
T-08
Water Resources & Environmental Protection

📄
Call for Abstracts — Submission Guidelines

📢 Authors are invited to submit original, high-quality abstracts addressing the conference themes and technical tracks listed below. Submissions must be original, unpublished, and not under review elsewhere.
📋 Abstract Requirements
Length300 – 500 words
File FormatPDF Only
Review ProcessDouble-Blind Peer Review
Plagiarism LimitLess than 20%
Submission DeadlineJune 08, 2026
Acceptance NotificationJune 28, 2026

📎 Preparing your full paper? Download the Paper Template and Author Guidelines further down this page before you begin formatting.

✅
Accepted Abstracts

📢 This list updates automatically as the Organising Committee accepts new submissions — no need to refresh the page repeatedly. Each paper lists every author and co-author exactly as submitted, with the corresponding author marked. If your name, affiliation, or co-author details need correcting, please email the Secretariat with your Submission ID (shown on the right of your card).

🗓️
Conference Program● LIVE

📢 Presentations begin Tuesday afternoon (Day 2) and run through Day 4, generated automatically from the live Accepted Abstracts feed. Each presenter is assigned a fixed time slot the moment their paper is accepted — later acceptances are added to the back of the queue and never shift an already-assigned presenter's time. Clock times are provisional 15-minute slots and may be fine-tuned by the committee.
🔒 Once you see your name on this schedule, that time slot is yours — plan your travel and preparation around it. New abstracts accepted later are simply queued after the last-scheduled presenter in their track, so earlier presenters are never moved.
Gateway ICT Polytechnic, Saapade, Ogun State, Nigeria · 20–24 July 2026 · Timezone: WAT (UTC+1)
DayDateFocus
Day 1Mon, 20 JulArrival & Registration — no sessions
Day 2Tue, 21 JulOpening Ceremony, Chief Guest Remarks, Keynote Addresses 1, 2 & 4 and Industrial Lead Paper Presentation, then Parallel Technical Sessions begin (live) from 14:15
Day 3Wed, 22 JulKeynote Addresses 3 & 5, then Parallel Technical Sessions continue (live) + Poster Session
Day 4Thu, 23 JulParallel Technical Sessions conclude (live) + Closing & Awards
Day 5Fri, 24 JulDeparture — no sessions

📝
Full Paper Submission (Post-Conference)

Accepted presenters are invited to submit full papers for potential publication. The organising committee is pursuing publication through IEEE Xplore Digital Library (pending IEEE technical sponsorship approval). Authors will be notified of the confirmed publication outlet.

📐 Full Paper Requirements
FormatIEEE Two-Column Template
Length6 – 12 Pages
File FormatPDF (IEEE PDF eXpress compliant)
Review ProcessStandard IEEE review for Xplore inclusion
Submission DeadlineJuly 14, 2026 (post-conference)
Target PublicationIEEE Xplore Digital Library (pending approval)
📎 Download the official documents before you prepare your submission: use the ICSEECR 2026 Paper Template (IEEE two-column format) to format your manuscript, and consult the Author Guidelines for full submission requirements. Both files are also linked from the Registration & Submission page.
📄 Download Paper Template (.docx) 📘 Download Author Guidelines (.docx)

Award Sessions

ICSEECR 2026 will feature competitive award sessions recognizing excellence in research presentations.

🎓
Best Student Paper Presentation Award
Awarded to the most outstanding student research presentation, based on originality, technical quality, presentation, and impact.
Certificate of Excellence
Conference Recognition
Academic Visibility & Prestige
🧑‍🔬
Best Author Paper Presentation Award
Awarded to the best overall paper presentation for academic/industry authors, evaluated on innovation, methodology, and contribution to sustainability.
Certificate of Excellence
Conference Recognition
Academic Visibility & Prestige

🎓
Technical Programme Committee

The ICSEECR 2026 Technical Programme Committee (TPC) comprises academics and professionals drawn from Nigerian universities and polytechnics, as well as international collaborators. The full TPC list will be published here as confirmations are received.

📌 TPC Roles & Responsibilities
Review ProcessDouble-Blind Peer Review — each abstract reviewed by at least two independent experts
Review CriteriaOriginality, Technical Quality, Relevance to Themes, Clarity of Presentation
Ethics PolicyPlagiarism check required; submissions must be original and not under review elsewhere
TPC EnquiriesContact the Secretariat at [email protected]
📢 Call for Reviewers: Academics and professionals with relevant expertise are invited to serve as reviewers. Please contact the Secretariat with your CV and area(s) of specialisation.

📨
Abstract Submission

ℹ️ Submit your abstract using the form below. By submitting, authors confirm that the work is original, unpublished, and not concurrently under review elsewhere. Submissions must be in PDF format, 300–500 words, with less than 20% similarity index. The review process is double-blind.
